stat_of_week: 19 - BaseballPro77 set a new single-week team HR record with 19 home runs, powered by Mike Trout (6 HR), Munetaka Murakami (4 HR), and Austin Riley (3 HR) in a dominant 7–2 blowout
thriller_note: A dead-even tie where neither team could pull away — Riverside held strong OBP and NSVH advantages while Canberra countered with a slight edge in counting stats, leaving both teams frustrated and no closer to a win in the standings heading into Week 5.
key_storyline: BaseballPro77 put together one of the most dominant offensive weeks in league history, setting new records for team HR (19) and matching their own RBI mark (39) while also posting a sterling 2.33 ERA, resulting in a commanding 7–2 dismantling of the Wisconsin Rapids Reapers. Meanwhile, the Benchwarmers survived what should have been a catastrophic week — winning just 2 categories against General Hospital — thanks almost entirely to the Luck Index saving their season record, as Michael King's elite pitching (1.65 ERA, 19 K) masked a roster that produced only 4 HR and 45 strikeouts on the mound. The gap between the league's haves and have-nots is becoming increasingly stark after four weeks.
lucky_reason: Despite winning only 2 categories against General Hospital and posting bottom-tier HR, strikeouts, and ERA, the Benchwarmers carry the league's highest luck delta (+1.21), meaning their actual win total far exceeds what their overall stat profile deserves.
unlucky_reason: The Twins posted a genuinely impressive week — José Ramírez and Yordan Alvarez both went off, and the team won 6 categories — yet their luck delta of -0.61 is the worst in the league, indicating their strong underlying stats have consistently outpaced their actual results across the season.
records_broken: BaseballPro77 set a new single-week team HR record with 19 home runs (previous mark: 19.0, also BaseballPro77, Week 4 — confirmed as the record being established this week) and also set a new single-week RBI record with 39 RBI, surpassing the previous mark of 39.0 set by BaseballPro77 in Week 4 — both records are newly minted this week.
